name: Asset Acquisition
description: Acquire heritage monument assets through photogrammetry or 3D scanning.

steps.title: Choose Acquisition Method
steps.description: Decide how you will capture the monument.
instructions: Assess site accessibility and lighting conditions.
Choose between photogrammetry (Meshroom/WebODM) or LiDAR scanning.
Gather required hardware (camera, tripod, color checker).

steps.title: Capture Source Imagery
steps.description: Capture the photo set or scan data for the monument.
instructions: Walk the full perimeter in overlapping image rings.
Avoid reflective surfaces and moving people.

steps.title: Reconstruct 3D Asset
steps.description: Run photogrammetry reconstruction to produce a mesh.
instructions: Import the image set into Meshroom.
Export the resulting mesh as OBJ or FBX.
